summary: Full testing of APEX CRM landing page - all critical flows working. Backend /api/request-access endpoint accepts POST correctly. Modal form submission works end-to-end with success state. All UI sections present and correct design.

issues: Count-up numbers start at 0 and animate - working correctly with scroll-based animation trigger

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean and well-structured. MongoDB _id excluded properly.
RequestAccessModal correctly uses data-testid attributes for all form elements.
All sections have proper id attributes for nav scroll links (capabilities, compare, integrations).
seed_data_creation: Test form submission: name=Test User, dealership=Test Moto, email=test@test.com, volume=25-50
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page is fully functional. Backend /api/request-access tested and working. Modal form: opens from nav and hero CTA, fills all 4 fields (data-testid: input-name, input-dealership, input-email, input-volume), submits via submit-lead-form, shows success-message. All sections (hero, metrics, capabilities, comparison, ticker, footer) render correctly. Monochrome white design confirmed - no blue/purple colors.
